whats_this.heading: Welcome to the CNIC Guide Application Wizard
whats_this.sub: Let's get your Computerised National Identity Card done correctly
whats_this.description: The Computerized National Identity Card (CNIC) is an official identity document for Pakistani citizens. It is required for voting, opening bank accounts, getting a passport, obtaining a driving license, and more.
quick_instructions: Answer a few questions about your application type
Receive a custom roadmap and document checklist
Validate your application against pre-submission requirements
whats_this.disclaimer: This wizard provides general guidance based on publicly available information and should not be considered legal advice. Requirements may vary and can change over time. Always verify current procedures with your local NADRA office.

document_need.title: Application Setup
document_need.description: Help us customize the process by telling us a bit about your situation.

questions.title: Who is applying?

options.title: Standard Adult
options.description: Has parents or siblings already registered with NADRA.

options.title: Special Case / Orphan
options.description: No blood relative with a NADRA record available.

questions.note: Note: Women, men, and transgender individuals fall under the standard category as long as they have verifiable blood relatives.

options.title: New CNIC
options.description: Applying for the very first time (age 18+)

options.title: Correction / Update
options.description: Fixing details (name, DOB, marital status, address)

options.title: Replacement / Renewal
options.description: CNIC is expired, lost, stolen, or damaged

location.title: Location Information
location.description: Your current residential address helps determine the nearest NADRA centers.
location.country_note: This wizard is specifically for Pakistan CNIC applications.
location.location_note: Why location matters: For a CNIC application, your residential address dictates the specific NADRA center you must visit. Ensuring this matches your supporting documents is crucial to avoid application rejection.

onlinePhases.title: Download App
onlinePhases.description: Download the PakID app on your smartphone and register an account using your mobile number and email address.

onlinePhases.title: Details & Documents
onlinePhases.description: On Home page, go to ID Documents and select ID Card. Choose application category. Select the purpose(new, update card, etc). Enter applicant’s personal details. Upload supporting documents including Birth Certificate or B-Form, School Leaving Certificate, Guardian Certificate (if any), Affidavit, and UC/Police Verification. Review carefully.

onlinePhases.title: Submit & Verification
onlinePhases.description: Submit application for NADRA verification. Pay fees online (Executive Rs 2500, Urgent Rs 1500, Normal Rs 750). Applicant will be notified via SMS/app for biometric visit and final processing.

onsitePhases.title: Token & Registration
onsitePhases.description: Visit nearest NADRA Registration Center. Inform staff that you are applying WITHOUT BLOOD RELATIVE (Special Case). Get a special case token and wait for your turn. Visit early morning to avoid delays.

onsitePhases.title: Verification & Biometrics
onsitePhases.description: Biometric capture. Document verification including Birth Certificate/B-Form, School Leaving Certificate, Guardian Certificate (if any), Affidavit, and UC/Police verification. No family biometric required. Attestation by Gazetted Officer. Interview by NADRA OIC. Fee submission.

onsitePhases.title: Review & Receipt
onsitePhases.description: Review printed application form. Sign it and collect your tracking receipt. CNIC will be printed and handed over after completion of NADRA verification.

documents_checklist.label: Birth Certificate
documents_checklist.description: Original birth certificate from Union Council.

documents_checklist.label: School Certificate
documents_checklist.description: If applicable, from your last attended educational institute.

documents_checklist.label: Affidavit
documents_checklist.description: Explaining your family status and why parents' CNICs are unavailable.

documents_checklist.label: Court Verification
documents_checklist.description: Legal proof of guardianship from a court or recognized institution.

documents_checklist.label: Police Verification
documents_checklist.description: Local clearance to verify your identity.

onlinePhases.title: Download App
onlinePhases.description: Download the PakID app on your smartphone and register an account using your mobile number and email address.

onlinePhases.title: Details & Biometrics
onlinePhases.description: On Home page, go to ID Documents and select ID Card. Choose application category. Capture applicant's Photograph & Fingerprints. Enter the personal details. Upload documents, if required. Review and verify information.

onlinePhases.title: Payment & Submit
onlinePhases.description: Submit application. Fee submission (Executive Rs 2500, Urgent Rs 1500, Normal Rs 750) excluding delivery fee. CNIC will be printed and handed over upon completion.

onsitePhases.title: Token & Waiting
onsitePhases.description: Visit your nearest NADRA Registration Center, get a queue token, and wait for your turn. Visit early morning to avoid rush.

onsitePhases.title: Data Entry & Biometrics
onsitePhases.description: Biometric Verification (anyone of parents or sibling). Photographs and fingerprints are mandatory. Your data will be entered and reviewed. Attestation by anyone of the parents or siblings or by Gazetted officer. Interview by OIC. Fee submission.

onsitePhases.title: Review & Receipt
onsitePhases.description: Review the printed application form carefully. Sign it and collect your tracking receipt.

documents_checklist.label: Original B-Form (CRC)
documents_checklist.description: Or original Birth Certificate. Without originals, application may be rejected.

documents_checklist.label: Parents' CNIC Copies
documents_checklist.description: Clear copies of at least one parent's CNIC (both is better).

documents_checklist.label: Proof of Residence
documents_checklist.description: Utility bill or domicile in your parent's/your name.

documents_checklist.label: Active Mobile Number
documents_checklist.description: For OTP verification and SMS tracking.

onlinePhases.title: Download App
onlinePhases.description: Download the PakID app on your smartphone and register an account using your mobile number and email address.

onlinePhases.title: Details & Biometrics
onlinePhases.description: On Home page, go to ID Documents and select ID Card. Choose Update Card. Capture applicant's Photograph & Fingerprints. Enter the new personal details. Upload supporting proof of modification. Review and verify information.

onlinePhases.title: Payment & Submit
onlinePhases.description: Submit application. Fee submission (Executive Rs 2500, Urgent Rs 1500, Normal Rs 750) excluding delivery fee. Modified CNIC will be printed and handed over upon completion.

onsitePhases.title: Token & Waiting
onsitePhases.description: Visit your nearest NADRA Registration Center, get a queue token, and wait for your turn. Visit early morning to avoid rush.

onsitePhases.title: Data Entry & Modification
onsitePhases.description: Provide your original CNIC and proof of modification. Your data will be updated and reviewed. Biometric Verification may be required. Attestation by Gazetted officer. Interview by OIC. Fee submission.

onsitePhases.title: Review & Receipt
onsitePhases.description: Review the printed application form carefully to ensure modifications are correct. Sign it and collect your tracking receipt.

documents_checklist.label: Original Existing CNIC
documents_checklist.description: Your current CNIC card that needs correction.

documents_checklist.label: Proof of Modification
documents_checklist.description: E.g., Nikkah Nama for marital status, Matriculation transcript for DOB, Utility Bill for address change.

documents_checklist.label: Relative CNIC Copies
documents_checklist.description: Parents' or Spouse's CNIC copies if modifying family linkages.

onlinePhases.title: Download App
onlinePhases.description: Download the PakID app on your smartphone and register an account using your mobile number and email address.

onlinePhases.title: Details & Biometrics
onlinePhases.description: On Home page, go to ID Documents and select ID Card. Choose Replacement/Renewal. Capture applicant's Photograph & Fingerprints. Verify the existing personal details. Review and verify information.

onlinePhases.title: Payment & Submit
onlinePhases.description: Submit application. Fee submission (Executive Rs 2500, Urgent Rs 1500, Normal Rs 750) excluding delivery fee. New CNIC will be printed and handed over upon completion.

onsitePhases.title: Token & Waiting
onsitePhases.description: Visit your nearest NADRA Registration Center, get a queue token, and wait for your turn. Visit early morning to avoid rush.

onsitePhases.title: Verification & Renewal
onsitePhases.description: Provide FIR or copy of old CNIC. Your existing data will be verified. Biometric Verification may be required. Fee submission.

onsitePhases.title: Review & Receipt
onsitePhases.description: Review the printed application form carefully. Sign it and collect your tracking receipt.

documents_checklist.label: Copy of Lost/Old CNIC
documents_checklist.description: If available, otherwise ensure you know your 13-digit CNIC number.

documents_checklist.label: Loss Report / FIR
documents_checklist.description: A non-cognizable (NC) report or FIR from local police station.

documents_checklist.label: Original Secondary ID
documents_checklist.description: Passport or Domicile as secondary photo ID proof, if requested.

validation.title: Certificate Validation
validation.description: Ensure your CNIC meets all immigration requirements before submission

upload_section.title: Upload Your CNIC
upload_section.description: Upload your CNIC to Document vault.

items.label: Original B-Form / CRC or old CNIC is ready
Attestation by a Grade-16+ officer included (if required)
Processing fee available based on selection (Normal/Urgent/Executive)

tips: Double check if you are a Special Case before selecting it.
Corrections require solid proof, such as academic records or Nikkah Nama.
pitfalls: Don't select New CNIC if you've already had one and lost it. Select Replacement.
Ensure you apply for the correct CNIC modification category.

tips: Your nearest NADRA center is based on your current residential address.
Urban areas generally have NADRA Mega Centers for faster processing.
pitfalls: Don't assume any NADRA center can process your request — check availability.
Avoid visiting on Fridays after 12 PM as most centers close early.

tips: Gather all required documents before visiting the NADRA center.
Visit during weekday mornings for shorter wait times.
pitfalls: Don't visit without original B-form — photocopies alone are not accepted.
Missing family member documents will delay your application.

tips: Confirm office hours before visiting; some close early on Fridays.
Bring photocopies of all documents in addition to originals.
pitfalls: Don't rely on unofficial centers — only visit authorized NADRA Registration Centers.

tips: Verify all spellings match your passport and other official documents exactly.
Check that attestation is from a valid Grade 16+ officer.
pitfalls: Don't submit with spelling mismatches — it will cause lifelong issues.
Don't assume your old CNIC info will auto-correct.
